name: Football Game
short_description: You are Tommy, a local high school football hero in the town of East Bend. It’s game night for the Purchase County Turbines and your sweetheart is waiting in the bleachers. Join Tommy for a night you won’t forget...
detailed_description:
Check out our latest game!


About the Game

A short new Lynchian point and click thriller from the creators of A Date in the Park!

STORY:

East Bend, Purchase County. 1987.

You are Tommy, a local high school football hero in the town of East Bend. It’s game night for the Purchase County Turbines and your sweetheart is waiting in the bleachers.

However, something is amiss...

Join Tommy for a night you won’t forget!

FEATURES:

  • A traditional point and click adventure game aesthetic with puzzles and dialogue interactions familiar to the genre.
  • A cast of characters including friends, foes, teachers, and a concerned mother.
  • A short, twisted narrative with approximately 1 to 2 hours of gameplay, depending on the player.
  • An award-winning original soundtrack by UK duo JUPITER-C - also available via DLC

INSPIRATIONS:

  • Traditional point and click adventure games from the '80s and '90s.
  • The music and films of David Lynch.
  • Young love.
